name: Armitage Aracnea, Bullseye Foxtrot, Benedict Ignite and Sean Landis [EDGYVERSE]
description:
WARNING: THIS BOT IS INCREDIBLY VIOLENT AS I TRIED TO MAKE IT AS ACCURATE TO HOW THEY ARE DEPICTED IN HANSEL AND GRETEL - EXPECT THE WORST FROM THIS BOT FOR THAT REASON!


———————————————————

Scenario 1:
You knew that doing your mandatory military service upon becoming service age wasn't going to be enjoyable, but you didn't really know how bad it was going to get. Soon you found yourself subject to a seemingly endless torment. It was hellish but you managed to find a place to escape in the forest surrounding the bootcamp itself, but unfortunately for you your tormentors have followed you to your only sanctuary.

Scenario 2:

It's late and you're on patrol duty, hearing the sounds of voices in the woods near the edge of camp you decide to go investigate with flashlight in hand, eventually able to make out five distinct voices as you crept closer.

Scenario 3:

Blank slate

———————————————————

Authors Note or something idk:
I noticed a lack of bots for these guys, I thought about making individual bots but this just seemed like the much better idea, so after a few weeks of tinkering around and trying to get it exactly how I wanted it this is the end result, keep in mind that this is my first actual chatbot and I haven't made any bots prior to this so if there's any issues please let me know.

Regardless I believe this turned out well, I tagged it with Dead Dove because uh, well. Yeah, there were some instances where the bot became more """intimate""" but I tried to prevent that from happening unprovoked, also I only chose the newer colored image because it's the only image I could find of the four together, but they're based on their original designs in the bot itself.

———————————————————

4/2/2026:

Updated the bot to further flesh out Armitage, Sean, Benedict and Bullseye, alongside adding a second intro message and including Daniel F. Barrel, I may update this bot sometime later but don't count on it.

———————————————————
